title: event — permissions
scope_suffix_convention: Read permissions may carry a scope suffix (`.any`, `.tenant`). Event has no `.branch` / `.org` variants because visibility filtering handles that — the base permission grants access to every event the caller can see per the visibility model. Writes are always tenant-scoped.

permissions.name: events.viewAny
permissions.description: List events. Row-level visibility (public / tenant_only / participants_only / private) filters what each role actually sees.

permissions.name: events.view
permissions.description: Single-event read. Visibility rules still apply.

permissions.name: events.viewPrivate
permissions.description: Read events with visibility='private'. Admin + owner only — private events are admin-facing dry runs / internal-only.

permissions.name: events.create
permissions.description: Consumes 1 unit of the event_slot entitlement per overlapping calendar year.

permissions.name: events.update
permissions.description: Mutable fields depend on status. See routes.json PATCH endpoint for the immutability matrix.

permissions.name: events.dates.shift
permissions.description: Owner-only. Permits starts_at / ends_at changes on Events with status IN (announced, registration_open, registration_closed, in_progress). Fires EventRescheduled (audit-warn) + cannot-opt-out notification to registered.

permissions.name: events.venue.change
permissions.description: Owner-only. Permits branch_id + primary facility change post-registration_open. Fires EventVenueChanged.

permissions.name: events.pricing.change
permissions.description: Owner-only. Permits entry_fee_cents / late_registration_fee_cents / prize_pool_cents change post-registration_open. Financial-audit-critical — every fire retained 7 years.

permissions.name: events.eligibility.narrow
permissions.description: Owner-only. Permits narrowing min_age / max_age / age_group_ids post-registration_open. Fires EventMinorEligibilityCorrected when the narrowing excludes existing registrants.

permissions.name: events.delete
permissions.description: Owner-only. Soft-delete (archive path). Hard-delete via retention purge only.

permissions.name: events.cancel
permissions.description: Fires EventCancelled + EventCancellationBroadcast (cannot-opt-out notification to registered).

permissions.name: events.publish
permissions.description: Set visibility='public'. Gated by event_public_visibility entitlement.

permissions.name: events.livestream.manage
permissions.description: Manage livestream_url + livestream_password. Gated by event_livestream entitlement.

permissions.name: events.enroll.late
permissions.description: Permission for the downstream enrollment surface (Wave 3+) to accept event registrations in the late-registration window. NOT seeded on the reception role by default — admins explicitly grant it.

permissions.name: events.manage
permissions.description: Umbrella permission for the settings blueprint gate. Admin + owner.

permissions.name: platform.events.force_cancel
permissions.description: Force-cancel escape hatch. Two-person path — ops must document the incident + get super_admin approval. Fires EventCancelled + EventCancellationBroadcast.
